attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PLAN_SEQ_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PLAN_ACTION_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.LEG_COUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.LEG_SEQUENCE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.BUY_SELL, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.LOAD_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.SHIP_METHOD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.SHIPMENT_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.TOTAL_FREIGHT_CHARGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PICKUP_STOP, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.DROPOFF_STOP, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.SLC_PARTNER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PROCESS_STAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF,
 (
 select PLAN_SEQ_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF
 minus
 select PLAN_SEQ_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IC
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PLAN_SEQ_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.PLAN_SEQ_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHPMNT_IB_IFC)
